title: 用 XML 标签组织复杂 prompt
title_en: Use XML Tags to Structure Complex Prompts

body.goal: 用 XML 标签把长 prompt 的不同部分清晰分隔，让 Claude 准确识别每段内容的用途
steps: 用 <instructions> 包裹核心指令，用 <context> 包裹背景资料，用 <examples> 包裹示例
用 <input> 或自定义标签（如 <document>、<code>）包裹用户提供的动态内容
标签名用小写英文，保持语义清晰，例如 <format>、<constraints>
嵌套标签表达层级关系，例如 <examples> 里放多个 <example>
好处：Claude 对 XML 标签有很强的识别能力，比纯文本分隔（如 '---'）更可靠地划分 prompt 的不同区域

body_en.goal: Use XML tags to clearly separate different sections of a long prompt so Claude accurately identifies each part's purpose
steps: Wrap core instructions in <instructions>, background material in <context>, and examples in <examples>
Wrap user-provided dynamic content in <input> or custom tags like <document>, <code>
Use lowercase English tag names with clear semantics, e.g. <format>, <constraints>
Nest tags to express hierarchy, e.g. multiple <example> elements inside <examples>
Why it works: Claude recognizes XML tags much more reliably than plain-text separators like '---' for delineating prompt sections
